name: Continuity
description: Cross-channel continuity capture, review, and recall for direct chats.

capture.mainDirect.label: Main Direct Capture
capture.mainDirect.help: How to handle durable items from the canonical main direct session.

capture.pairedDirect.label: Paired Direct Capture
capture.pairedDirect.help: How to handle durable items from other direct-message sessions.

capture.group.label: Group Capture
capture.group.help: Groups default to off to avoid accidental cross-chat memory capture.

capture.channel.label: Channel Capture
capture.channel.help: Channel and broadcast sessions default to off.

capture.minConfidence.label: Min Confidence
capture.minConfidence.help: Discard extracted items below this score.

review.autoApproveMain.label: Auto-Approve Main
review.autoApproveMain.help: Allow the main direct chat to auto-promote durable items when capture is auto.

review.requireSource.label: Require Source
review.requireSource.help: Require a source excerpt before an item can be approved.

recall.maxItems.label: Max Recall Items
recall.maxItems.help: Maximum number of approved continuity items injected per prompt.

recall.includeOpenLoops.label: Include Open Loops
recall.includeOpenLoops.help: Include approved open loops in automatic continuity recall.

recall.scope.label: Recall Scope
recall.scope.help: Session send-policy rules controlling where continuity is recalled.
